Requirement: IF VehSpd > 250 kph, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_OOR_HI_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_HI - transition to safe state.
State: Torque = 0 Nm, LKA OFF, Warning ON
Rationale: The requirement explicitly defines a trigger (VehSpd > 250 kph), measurable system responses (detect F_OOR_HI_VehSpd, react, set DTC, transition to safe state) with time constraints, and aligns with INCOSE guidelines for clarity, specificity, and testability. No structural or syntactical violations identified.

Requirement: IF VehSpd < 0 kph, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_OOR_LO_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_LO - transition to safe state.
State: Torque = 0 Nm, LKA OFF, Warning ON
Rationale: The requirement uses 'THE SYSTEM' generically without specifying the exact system/component responsible for detecting F_OOR_LO_VehSpd, setting DTC_101_VSPD_OOR_LO, or transitioning to the safe state. This violates INCOSE guidelines for clarity and EARS syntax rules requiring explicit system identification to ensure unambiguous implementation and verification.

Requirement: IF VehSpd is not received within [50 ms], THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_TO_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_TO - transition to safe state.
State: Torque = 0 Nm, LKA OFF, Warning ON
Rationale: The requirement explicitly defines a trigger (VehSpd not received within 50 ms), a system (THE SYSTEM), modality (SHALL), and multiple measurable system responses (detect F_TO_VehSpd within 10 ms, react within 10 ms, set DTC_101_VSPD_TO, transition to safe state). It adheres to INCOSE guidelines for clarity, specificity, and verifiability, and follows EARS syntax with a structured conditional format. No critical rule violations identified.

Requirement: IF VehSpd AliveCounter is unchanged for [3 consecutive cycles], THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL: - detect F_ALC_VehSpd within [10 ms] - react within [10 ms] - set DTC_101_VSPD_ALC - transition to safe state.
State: Torque = 0 Nm, LKA OFF, Warning ON
Rationale: The requirement follows EARS syntax with clear trigger (VehSpd AliveCounter unchanged for 3 cycles), system name (THE SYSTEM), modality (SHALL), and structured responses (detect, react, set DTC, transition). All responses include measurable timing constraints (10 ms) and specific actions. No ambiguity in conditions or responses. Complies with INCOSE guidelines for clarity, testability, and specificity.
